metadata.name: initializer
metadata.description: Initializer program with bonding-curve launch, hooks, and programmable migration

accounts.name: hook_program
docs: Optional hook program (must match launch.hook_program if set)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Optional authority (creator/admin). If not provided, launch is permissionless.

accounts.name: hook_program
docs: Optional hook program for create hooks

accounts.name: migrator_program
docs: Optional migrator program for init hook

accounts.name: metadata_account
docs: Metadata account (PDA derived from base_mint via Metaplex Token Metadata).

accounts.name: metadata_program
docs: Metaplex Token Metadata program.

accounts.name: hook_program
docs: Optional hook program (must match launch.hook_program if set)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority of the launch (must match launch.authority or config.admin)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority of the launch (must match launch.authority or config.admin)

errors.name: SellDisableNotAllowed
errors.msg: Sell disable not allowed once enabled

errors.name: RemainingAccountOverlap
errors.msg: Remaining account overlaps with protocol account

errors.name: RemainingAccountSigner
errors.msg: Remaining accounts must not be signers

fields.name: hook_create_remaining_accounts_hash
docs: Commitment hash for initialize_launch hook remaining accounts.
Computed as hash(u32_len || pubkey_0 || ... || pubkey_n).

fields.name: hook_remaining_accounts_hash
docs: Commitment hash for swap/preview hook remaining accounts.
Computed as hash(u32_len || pubkey_0 || ... || pubkey_n).

fields.name: migrator_init_remaining_accounts_hash
docs: Commitment hash for migrator-init remaining accounts.
Computed as hash(u32_len || pubkey_0 || ... || pubkey_n).

fields.name: migrator_remaining_accounts_hash
docs: Commitment hash for migrator-migrate remaining accounts.
Computed as hash(u32_len || pubkey_0 || ... || pubkey_n).

fields.name: metadata_name
docs: Token name for on-chain metadata. If empty, metadata creation is skipped.

fields.name: metadata_symbol
docs: Token symbol for on-chain metadata.

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Metadata JSON URI for on-chain metadata.
